name: digital-colleague-core
description: Operate and diagnose the one digital colleague configured in this clone.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect, validate, and operate one colleague.
interface.longDescription: Run safe local preflight, identity inspection, health checks, and bounded runtime operations for the configured digital colleague.
defaultPrompt: Check whether my configured colleague is ready.
Inspect the colleague identity without printing secrets.
Diagnose the local web and runtime health.
